# apply(_:)

**Instance Method**

Applies a pose.

## Declaration

```swift
mutating func apply(_ pose: Pose3DFloat)
```

## Parameters

- **pose**: The pose. This function rotate’s the ray’s direction by the pose’s rotation and sets the ray’s origin to the pose’s position.
title: apply(_:)
